name: para_create_project
description: JSON-RPC contract to create a new project folder under PARA methodology.

name: para_route_resource
description: JSON-RPC contract to route an incoming note/asset to a specific PARA category (Projects, Areas, Resources, or Archives).

content_id.description: ID of the note or asset.

subcategory.description: Specific folder inside the main category.

name: memory_query
description: Query the persistent SQLite/ScaNN memory for facts.

query_string.description: Semantic string to search in the knowledge base.

limit.description: Max number of results to return.
